case_title: BELEN DELGADO VS. JEREMY OLIVEIRA et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELGADO, BELEN AS TO DEFENDANT OLIVEIRA, JEREMY DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-12-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-05-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-15-2002

DECLARATION RE:OSC FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELGADO, BELEN
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY EDWARD A. PUTTRE. THE APR-12-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-22-2002 CONTINUED TO JUL-03-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). MAY-22-2002 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ARBITRATOR MICHAEL FRANCIS O'LEARY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION SEP-06-2002 THROUGH DEC-05-2002.
